name: skill-test-dynamic-stop-and-live-trace-ui
title: Optimize skill test dynamic stop and live trace UI
description: Focus dynamic skill evaluation on successful skill loading, stop the agent loop immediately after confirmed target skill load, and add live tool/output trace visibility in the skill test UI with chat workbench code reuse where practical.
creator: 菲比啾比
notes: Dynamic mode should stop as soon as the target skill load is confirmed. Frontend should expose live tool/output traces and prefer reuse of chat workbench trace helpers.
